prestazioni: Engine: L15B7T (1.5L VTEC Turbo) with forged internals including a billet crankshaft from Tomei, Manley H-beam connecting rods, and JE 8.5:1 compression forged pistons for 35 psi boost tolerance
Turbocharger: Garrett GTX3582R Gen II with TiAl 44mm external wastegate, custom 3.5" stainless downpipe, and GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller for 400+ whp on E85
Suspension: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 30-way adjustable damping, custom-spec front camber plates from Buddy Club, and rear subframe reinforcement using a Spoon Sports aluminum brace
estetica: Aero: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit with carbon fiber overfenders, custom 3D-printed front splitter with integrated canards (designed via CFD for 120+ kg downforce at 160 km/h)
Wheels: Volk Racing TE37V in 18x9.5 +15 front and 18x10.5 +20 rear with custom offset machining, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (245/35/18 front, 275/30/18 rear)
Interior: Recaro SPG-K seats with custom Alcantara upholstery (Honda Racing Blue stitching), MOMO Prototipo steering wheel with quick-release hub, and a full carbon fiber dash overlay from Seibon
